title: Rebuild and restart CommonsV2 with binary decode fix

log.context: Rebuild and restart CommonsV2 with binary decode fix

Done. Here's the summary:

- Commit hash: `0f969ce` — pushed to `github.com:bigclungus/labs.git` (master)
- Lab restarted on port 8107, responding HTTP 200

The fix adds `ws.binaryType = "arraybuffer"` and wraps incoming messages with `new TextDecoder().decode(event.data)` before `JSON.parse`, so binary frames from commons-server are now decoded correctly.
